introSection: Oasis Express was a steel roller coaster located at Kuwait Entertainment City in North West Al-Sulaibikhat, Al Asimah, Kuwait. The ride was a unique design designed by Anton Schwarzkopf and Werner Stengel.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The ride had red track and yellow supports.

sections.title: Notes
sections.content: Schwarzkopf listed this as from the "Speed Racer" line. This coaster was very different from earlier Speedracer models. This coaster had the track system of a Looping Star and used a traditional chain lift and multi section cars unlike the first generation Speedracers. Thus, we didn't consider it part of that line.

fullText:
Oasis Express was a steel roller coaster located at Kuwait Entertainment City in North West Al-Sulaibikhat, Al Asimah, Kuwait. The ride was a unique design designed by Anton Schwarzkopf and Werner Stengel.

The ride had red track and yellow supports.



Schwarzkopf listed this as from the "Speed Racer" line. This coaster was very different from earlier Speedracer models. This coaster had the track system of a Looping Star and used a traditional chain lift and multi section cars unlike the first generation Speedracers. Thus, we didn't consider it part of that line.
